meta.title: Full-Arch Dental Implants · Aria Implant Studio
meta.description: A fixed full set of teeth in as little as one day — no more loose dentures. All-on-4 dental implants at Aria Implant Studio.

hero.sub: A fixed, natural-looking full set of teeth in as little as one day — secured by implants, so they never slip, click or come out.

pain.title_html:
Living around your teeth,
instead of with them.

cards.title: Choosing soft foods
cards.body: Steak, crusty bread, fresh apples — quietly off the menu. You order around what your teeth can manage, not what you want.

cards.title: Dentures that betray you
cards.body: Adhesive in your bag, the fear of a slip mid-sentence, the click no one else hears but you can't stop noticing.

cards.title: Smiling with your hand up
cards.body: Hiding your mouth in photos, laughing carefully. A smile should be the easiest thing you do — not the most self-conscious.

problem.title_html:
When teeth are lost,
the jawbone melts away with them.
problem.lede: Every tooth root stimulates the bone that holds it. Lose the tooth and the bone beneath starts to shrink — which is why dentures fit worse every year and the lower face begins to collapse inward.

points.title: Bone resorbs without roots
points.body: Within a year of losing a tooth, up to 25% of the surrounding bone can disappear — and it keeps going.

points.title: Dentures sit on shrinking ground
points.body: They rest on the gum, not in it, so as bone recedes the fit loosens, sore spots appear, and adhesive stops helping.

points.title: Implants replace the root
points.body: Titanium posts fuse with the bone and stimulate it like real roots — stopping the slide and anchoring teeth for good.

story.title_html:
Most of the journey
happens in a single,
well-planned day.

timeline.title: 3D scan & full plan
timeline.body: A CBCT scan maps your bone in 3D. We plan every implant digitally before you're ever in the chair — no guesswork.

timeline.title: Implants & fixed teeth
timeline.body: Gently sedated, you receive your implants and a fixed temporary bridge the same day. You leave with teeth.

timeline.title: Your permanent set
timeline.body: As the implants fuse over a few months, we craft and fit your final, custom full-arch — built to last decades.

solution.mark_html: All-on-4 anchors a full arch of fixed teeth onto just four implants — so you walk out with a smile that stays put.

how.title_html:
Four implants. One arch.
A lifetime of confidence.
how.lede: Instead of one implant per tooth, the All-on-4 technique angles four implants to harness your strongest available bone — giving an entire arch of fixed teeth immediate, stable support, often without bone grafting.

steps.title: Digital 3D planning
steps.body: We scan and plan implant placement in software first, for precision and a predictable result before any surgery.

steps.title: Guided placement
steps.body: Four implants are placed and angled to maximise contact with healthy bone — fixed teeth attach the same day.

steps.title: Fuse & finalise
steps.body: Over a few months the implants integrate with bone, then your permanent, custom arch is fitted for good.

proof.title_html:
The first bite into an apple
in years.
proof.sample_note: Sample testimonials for layout — replace with verified, consented patient reviews and required disclaimers before publishing.

quotes.quote: I cried in the car. I bit into an apple for the first time in six years. No glue, no clicking — they just feel like my own teeth.
quotes.name: Margaret T.

quotes.quote: I'd hidden my smile for a decade. The whole thing was done under sedation and I felt nothing. I can't stop grinning now.
quotes.name: David R.

quotes.quote: From the 3D scan they showed me exactly what would happen. No surprises. Best decision I've made for myself in years.
quotes.name: Susan K.

authority.body: Aria Implant Studio does one thing and does it completely — full-arch implant dentistry, planned digitally and placed by an experienced implant surgeon. On-site 3D imaging and our own lab mean your case is controlled end to end, with honest advice about whether All-on-4 is right for you.
creds: In-house lab for precise, lasting prosthetics

items.title: Free implant consultation
items.body: A no-pressure assessment of your suitability, your goals, and a clear, itemised plan with no hidden costs.

items.title: 3D CBCT scan & digital plan
items.body: A full 3D view of your bone so every implant is planned with precision before treatment day.

items.title: Sedation & same-day teeth
items.body: Comfortable IV sedation options, and you leave treatment day with a fixed set of teeth — not a gap.

items.title: Aftercare & reviews
items.body: Guided healing, scheduled reviews, and your custom permanent arch crafted in our own lab.

offer.title: Full-Arch Assessment
offer.fine: Sample offer for demo. Confirm pricing, scan inclusions and any conditions before publishing.

yes.title: All-on-4 may suit you if…
items: You're missing most or all teeth in an arch, or facing it soon
Your dentures are loose, painful or undermining your confidence
You want fixed teeth, not something you remove at night
You'd rather solve it properly once than keep relining dentures

no.title: We'll talk it through if…
items: You have only one or two teeth missing — a single implant may be better
You have uncontrolled health conditions affecting healing — we'll advise honestly
You're looking for the cheapest short-term patch rather than a lasting solution

items.a: Treatment is done under local anaesthetic with IV sedation options, so most patients feel nothing during the procedure. Post-treatment discomfort is usually well managed with simple pain relief and settles within days.

items.q: Do I really get teeth the same day?
items.a: In most cases, yes — you leave treatment day with a fixed temporary bridge. Your permanent, custom arch is fitted once the implants have fused with the bone over the following months.
Yes. Your final arch is custom-designed in our lab for your face, shade and bite — built to look and function like healthy natural teeth.
With good care and regular reviews, dental implants can last decades — many a lifetime. The fixed teeth on top may be refreshed over the years like any restoration.
Every case differs, so we provide a clear, itemised plan at your consultation along with financing and payment-plan options. No hidden fees.
With a free consultation and 3D scan. We assess your suitability, answer everything, and only recommend treatment that's genuinely right for you.

final.body: Because soon, they will be. Start with a free consultation and 3D scan — and a clear, honest plan with no obligation.

info.body_html:
Free consult + 3D scan
No obligation to proceed
